name: AVITA MEDICAL  CDIS/5/1
summary: AVITA MEDICAL CDIS/5/1 is a stock ticker representing shares of Avita Medical, a regenerative medicine company focused on developing and commercializing innovative products for wound care and skin restoration. The company's lead product, RECELL®, is a device that enables healthcare professionals to produce Spray-On Skin™ Cells at the point of care for thermal burn wounds and other skin defects and is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. The company's headquarters are located in Valencia, California.
